notes:
vMLX 1.5.43

Highlights:
- Native Qwen3.6 MTP app/API wiring is release-gated on real runtime state.
- Qwen3.6 hybrid SSM uses live TurboQuant KV only for attention layers while SSM/ArraysCache companion state remains native full precision.
- Chat settings, cache controls, interleaved reasoning, media follow-ups, and tool auto-continue are integrated across the panel and engine.
- Sampling defaults stay model-owned until users override them.
- Hugging Face GUI downloads recover from stale backup endpoints and stale tokens.
- macOS packaging lanes are split into Sequoia/Sonoma-compatible and Tahoe-native DMGs.

Verification:
- Task 8 parity gates covered MXFP4, MXFP8, and JANG_4M hybrid live TQ-KV with selective attention-layer TurboQuant matching full-precision live KV on deterministic probes.
- Task 8 MTP/VL reruns covered MXFP4 D2, MXFP8 D3, and JANG_4M D3 with native MTP active, text+VL scope, visible non-empty output, and selective live attention TQ-KV active.
- Real Electron/CDP chat proof covered reasoning streaming, run/list/image/video tool calls, tool auto-continue, media follow-up content, cache UI toggles, and absence of raw think/tool-tag leakage.
- DMGs are signed, notarized, stapled, and accepted by Gatekeeper as Notarized Developer ID.

DMG choice: use vMLX-1.5.43-sequoia-arm64.dmg for macOS Sonoma/Sequoia-compatible installs; use vMLX-1.5.43-tahoe-arm64.dmg for macOS Tahoe-native installs.
